data.title: Nifty Gateway, a once-popular NFT marketplace owned by Gemini, will shut down on Feb. 23, 2026, due to the sector’s downturn.
data.description: On February 23, 2026, the NFT platform owned by Gemini is set to shut down, joining the list of major casualties in the sector due to the extended downturn. After this date, the platform will only allow for withdrawals.

data.title: Aptos (APT) at $1.55, may hit $2.10 short-term and $2.43 medium-term despite oversold conditions.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Aptos (APT) is currently trading at $1.55, with technical indicators signaling oversold conditions. Analysts predict a short-term recovery target price of $2.00-$2.10 and anticipate a medium-term potential to reach $2.43.

data.title: NEAR Protocol potentially targets $1.87-$2.35 recovery by Feb 2026, with current oversold conditions at $1.50 and resistance at $1.54.
data.description: NEAR Protocol is currently indicating oversold conditions at $1.50, with analysts forecasting a potential recovery zone between $1.87 and $2.35. A technical breakout above the $1.54 resistance level may lead to a notable rally in price. Investors are closely monitoring these key levels for potential market movements.

data.title: LTC price at $68.50, RSI 34.06 shows oversold status. Analysts expect $72-80 recovery by Feb 2026 on technical reversal signs.
data.description: The current trading price of Litecoin is $68.50, and its Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 34.06, indicating oversold conditions. Analysts anticipate a potential recovery of LTC to the range of $72-80 by February 2026, based on technical indicators suggesting a possible reversal in the trend.

data.title: Cosmos (ATOM) aims $2.75 by February with current consolidation at $2.30. RSI neutral, key support at $2.26.
data.description: The current price of ATOM is at $2.30, showing consolidation, but there is a potential for an upside to $2.75 in the short term. Technical analysis indicates a neutral RSI and identifies key support at $2.26 for Cosmos.

data.title: By February 2026, BCH is expected to hit $720-$750. Short-term target: $610-$620. Bullish breakout: $602.80. Support at $586.
data.description: Summary of BCH Price Forecast:- Short-term price target spanning 1 week is estimated to be between $610 and $620.- In the medium-term forecast covering 1 month, the price is projected to range from $720 to $750.- The level indicating a bullish breakout is pegged at $602.80.- Critical support for the BCH price is identified at $586.

data.title: UNI price aims for $6.29 by Feb as oversold conditions signal potential rally. Currently at $4.83 with RSI 35.56. Technical analysis suggests 30% rally ahead.
data.description: Uniswap's (UNI) current trading price stands at $4.83, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) registers at 35.56, indicating oversold conditions. Technical analysis suggests the possibility of a 30% increase, aiming for the resistance level of $6.29.

data.title: Price prediction for LINK sees $14.50 target by February with key resistance near $14.52, support at $13.20.
data.description: The LINK price is expected to reach $14.50-$15.00 in the short term (1 week) and $15.50-$16.50 within a month. A bullish breakout is anticipated if the price surpasses $14.52, with a critical support level set at $13.20.

data.title: DOT is predicted to reach $2.48 by month-end. Short-term target $2.07-$2.29, medium-term $2.48-$3.30. Bullish breakout at $2.48.
data.description: Summary of DOT Price Prediction: In the short-term (1 week), the target price is estimated to be between $2.07 and $2.29. Looking ahead to the medium-term (1 month), the forecast range is expected to be within $2.48 to $3.30. The bullish breakout level is set at $2.48, indicating a potential increase in value. It is crucial to note the critical support level for DOT at which it is expected to remain stable.

data.title: Analysts foresee DOGE hitting $0.16-$0.175 month-end from $0.123 despite neutral RSI and resistance breakout.
data.description: Analysts foresee the potential for Dogecoin (DOGE) to climb to between $0.16 and $0.175 by the end of the month, currently trading at $0.123. Technical analysis points to a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and the possibility of breaking through key resistance levels.

data.title: Solana is predicted to reach $136-160 by February. Currently trading at $126.84 with resistance at $128.49 crucial for the upside. RSI at 40.42, MACD signaling bearish trend.
data.description: Solana is currently trading at a price of $126.84, and market analysts are predicting price targets ranging from $136 to $180. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at a neutral level of 40.42, while the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicates a bearish momentum in the market. A key resistance level is identified at $128.49, which is crucial for potential upward movement in price.

data.description: The current trading price for BNB is $881.68, displaying bearish momentum. Despite this, analysts predict a potential recovery to a range of $950-$1,050 by February. Technical analysis indicates oversold conditions close to crucial support levels.

data.description: The current trading price of Ethereum is $2,947, accompanied by technical indicators signaling oversold conditions. Experts predict a possible rebound to the $3,200-$3,350 range based on analysis, provided that crucial support levels are maintained.

data.title: Bitcoin aims for $95,000 recovery by Feb. Currently at $89,004 with RSI signals. Analysis hints at $95,000-$97,000 range if $90,240 resistance breaks.
data.description: Currently, Bitcoin is being traded at a price of $89,004 and is showing neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) signals. Analysts predict a possible rebound to the range of $95,000-$97,000 if the crucial resistance level at $90,240 is breached definitively. This analysis indicates a potential increase in the value of Bitcoin in the near future.

data.title: Chances of US gov't shutdown in January skyrocket to 77%, following President Trump's warning.
data.description: Shortly after United States President Donald Trump made comments about a potential Democratic shutdown, the latest developments have emerged. The statement came within days, hinting at the possibility of facing another shutdown by the Democrats.

data.title: S.E.C. closes case against Winklevoss twins' firm in crypto – victims refunded money post N.Y. AG action.
data.description: According to reports, individuals who fell victim to an investment scheme linked to Gemini Trust have been able to recover their funds. This positive outcome was achieved following regulatory intervention by the New York attorney general.

data.title: DeWys Manufacturing in West Michigan awarded $115,525.00 grant for workforce training and career development by the State of Michigan.
data.description: A custom steel fabrication and metal manufacturing company named DeWys Manufacturing in West Michigan has recently been granted a total of $115,525.00 from the State of Michigan as a Going PRO Talent Fund award. This funding is intended to help DeWys Manufacturing enhance its workforce training and career development initiatives. It marks a significant investment in the company's growth and development.
